creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer,

please note that I've added two patches to your pver port.

Please review them and check pver-0.16 if they are already included --
if not, please include the patches upstream.

Please review version 0.16 and if it's fit for updating in the FreeBSD
ports tree, update the port. Feel free to Cc: me on any PR, or point me
to an existing PR.

Please report back to the PR what you find. Thank you.
